title: crotalaria willdenowiana subsp. willdenowiana
intro: Crotalaria willdenowiana subsp. willdenowiana is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the rattlebox. It is a shrub that grows up to 3 meters tall, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Crotalaria willdenowiana subsp. willdenowiana can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and the leaves can be used in traditional medicine to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems.
